description: Which modeling tools work with which solvers. true = officially supported, false = not supported, 'limited' = partial/experimental support.

notes.or-tools-py: OR-Tools has internal solvers (CP-SAT, GLOP, PDLP) and also wraps external solvers (Gurobi, CPLEX, SCIP, HiGHS, GLPK, CBC) through its pywraplp linear solver interface. External solvers must be installed separately.
notes.scipy: scipy.optimize.linprog uses HiGHS as its default LP solver since SciPy 1.9.
notes.gurobipy: Direct Gurobi API. By design, only works with Gurobi.
notes.ampl: Commercial modeling language. Supports virtually all major solvers through solver-specific drivers.
notes.gams: Commercial modeling language. Supports virtually all major solvers through solver-specific connectors.
notes.cvxpy: Primarily for convex optimization. SCS and ECOS also supported as free alternatives.
